message:
fix(compaction): skip file ops from failed tool calls, escape HTML entities in paths

- Add build_tool_status_map() to track successful vs failed tool calls
  from ToolResult messages in conversation history
- Modify extract_file_ops_from_message() to accept tool_status map and
  skip file operations from tool calls that returned errors — prevents
  compaction summaries from including operations that were never applied
- Add HTML entity escaping (<, >, &) in format_file_operations() to
  prevent XSS-like rendering issues in session export
- New test: extract_file_ops_ignores_failed_tools() validates filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
